notes: Supporting manifest-contract helper only. It derives targeted manifests from the canonical `data/cleaned/index/manifest_current.tsv` by explicit CLI predicates, writes the derived TSV plus selection metadata, and does not infer scope by recency, convenience, or hidden defaults.

Dedicated maintained fine-grained execution surfaces also exist for frozen substeps such as S2-4a, S2-4b, S2-5, S2-6, and S2-7.
